query: SELECT id, name, email FROM agents WHERE name LIKE '%Jackjones%' OR name LIKE '%Robert%' OR name LIKE '%jack%' OR name LIKE '%robert%' OR email LIKE '%jackjones%' OR email LIKE '%robert.33021%' OR name LIKE '%Zack%' OR name LIKE '%103%';
